bottom_line: Add a platform-level guard that detects non-actionable fix cycles and auto-escalates instead of looping retries.
coverage_notes: DB telemetry available (db-identity check: UP). Reviewed step inventory via `iw item-status --json`. Read S01-S13/S16 small logs directly; sampled heavy QV logs by targeted tails/grep and focused on fix-cycle logs for failure roots. No log exceeded 1 MB in the analyzed set for promoted findings.

findings.title: Fix-cycle thrash on non-actionable failures
findings.recommendation: Add daemon/executor detection for repeated identical non-actionable diagnostics and auto-escalate/mark blocked after N cycles.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00090_S06_fix2.log:3 — "Process exited without reporting completion (PID dead)"
ai-dev/logs/F-00090_S06_fix3.log:5 — "crash of the review agent itself"
ai-dev/logs/F-00090_S15_fix7.log:10 — "test hardcodes _HEAD_REVISION ... current head is d43ea9e75e8f"
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Add daemon/executor guardrails to auto-escalate repeated non-actionable fix-cycle failures (PID-dead reviewer crashes, unchanged out-of-scope blockers), based on F-00090 self-assessment (ai-dev/active/F-00090/reports/F-00090_self_assess_report.md).

findings.title: Browser verification prompt used wrong compose service name
findings.recommendation: Update browser verification prompt template to parameterize compose service name and avoid hardcoded `app`.
evidence: ai-dev/logs/F-00090_S16_fix1.log:8 — "running service is e2e-dashboard, not app"
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Update browser-verification prompt/template to avoid hardcoded compose service names (use project-specific service variable), based on F-00090 self-assessment report.

findings.title: Hardcoded Alembic head in integration test causes recurring false gate failures
findings.recommendation: Refactor deadlock integration test to resolve expected Alembic head dynamically instead of pinning a static revision string.
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Make test_phase2_apply_no_self_deadlock migration-head assertions dynamic (no static revision pin), per F-00090 self-assessment findings in ai-dev/active/F-00090/reports/F-00090_self_assess_report.md.

findings.title: Behavior-step TDD RED reporting contract drift
findings.recommendation: Enforce per-step TDD RED reporting rules in implementation prompt templates (S01/S05 must emit `n/a — ...`; behavior steps S02-S04 must include true RED run evidence).
findings.paste_prompt: /iw-new-cr Tighten implementation prompt templates to enforce step-specific TDD RED evidence policy, using F-00090 self-assessment as evidence (report path: ai-dev/active/F-00090/reports/F-00090_self_assess_report.md).
